reviews.review_description: Its a good game, good weapons fair quests, but i wish the bullets were a little faster...

reviews.review_title: I love chime ChaI love chime Chase Chase
reviews.review_description: Jim Chase is a very good VR game one of the best VR games that I have on a VR actually I really like this game but can you please add mini guns grenades in a map called mines please thank you. I love this game great game please add armour please please I love this game. I love playing this game with my friends. I love the idea of it it’s just like a really fun game like you should be proud of yourself ￼

This game is wonderful, the old game used to be bad but the new better owner ACTUALLY COOKED. The item shop is a lot better, with no pay-to-win items removing old game items that ruined the game, but the new owner helped this game become something so wonderful it’s so fun to PvP in.

reviews.review_title: lowkey thought it would be the same..
reviews.review_description: i played the other version of chimp chase, and when i heard the news it got a new owner, i wanted to check it out, but im sad to say: I quit. everything changed, not that im fine with change, i like change its just they changed the sound of the guns which hurts my ears, and it was dark. If you fix this, i may return.

developer_response.body: It is no longer dark and hasn't been for a while, and you are welcome to turn down the volume of your headset as needed. The only sound that was changed was the sound of the SMG.

reviews.review_description: Such a good game I'm top 5 now yippee

The game is now in the hands of a new set of Developers that actually know what they're doing, no p2w, smooth gameplay, they also listen to their community and the game feels simple in a good way, one thing that I will say though, is most of the playerbase is VERY sweaty 😭

I'm going to become number 1 on the lifetime kills leaderboard within the next 2 - 3 days hopefully 🙏

Anyways, great game! I'm excited to see what's to come!

- no p2w
- rifle got nerf 
- less laggy
they removed all the pay to win bundles and are attempting to make a difference

reviews.review_title: This is THE Chimp chase pvp
reviews.review_description: This game has awesome combat and mechanics and while there are a few small issues they will be fixed soon. Plus there is NO P2W. Really fun game that deserves more players.
Game is good pugs is a furry
I really love the dirt guns
